I’ve confirmed the expected proof symbols/files are present and now I’m validating the actual theorem content plus running the required build/test/lint commands.

## Issue success criteria

Met on proof content: required files exist (`ExtDefs.lean`, `ExtAlgebra.lean`, `ExtProgress.lean`, `QuadraticExtField.lean`, `CubicExtField.lean`), CommRing/Field transfer is present (`qextEquiv/cextEquiv` + transfer instances), Karatsuba equivalence theorems exist (`karatsuba_eq_schoolbook`, `cubic_karatsuba_eq_schoolbook`), norm-based inversion correctness exists (`inv_mul_cancel` in both QExt/CExt), order proofs exist (`qorder_progress`, `corder_progress`, plus headline theorems), and `Option.map` is now a concrete `def` in `FunsExternal.lean:73-78`.

## No technical debt

No `sorry`/`admit` in `proofs/Gf2Core/Proofs`.  
No new unsafe markers in proofs.  
No obvious architectural debt introduced by these files.

## Separation of concerns

Changes reviewed are Lean proof artifacts under `proofs/`; no evidence of `gf2-core` depending on `gf2-coding`.

## Functional paradigm and performance

No Rust algorithm/kernel changes in scope; no regression observed against functional/performance guidance.

## Correctness

Proofs directly encode requested algebraic properties; order theorems include explicit U128 overflow preconditions.  
BitVec tail-masking/bit-indexing invariants are unaffected (not touched in this delta).

## Testing

**Failing review criterion:** I could not execute required checks (`lake build`, `cargo fmt --check`, `cargo clippy`, `cargo test`) due environment error: `Permission denied and could not request permission from user`.  
Given the rule “no test or lint failures (including pre-existing),” this cannot be certified.

## Unsafe isolation

No new unsafe code introduced in reviewed changes.

## Documentation

Proof files include module headers and theorem-level comments. The requested proof-module structure is present.

## Prior review feedback (most recent run)

Most recent run’s functional gaps were addressed (order proofs and file set now present).  
Unresolved item remains: full test/lint verification still not demonstrated in this environment.

## Jit issue dependencies

Dependency `886af072-ecdf-477a-9fc7-685a88d7abf5` is marked `done`; prerequisite status appears satisfied.

VERDICT: FAIL

Gate result: FAILED
